name: @laude/extractor
description: MOCK seeder standing in for the offline Python pipeline: writes realistic fake songs/lyrics/chords/performances/time-annotations into the Firebase emulator. No yt-dlp/Demucs/ML — the real Extractor replaces this behind the same data contract. NOTE: intentionally CommonJS (no "type":"module") — chordsheetjs v12 has no ESM exports map, so @laude/chords only loads via tsx's CJS interop.
